calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Off Calendar

Petition To Invalidate Fifth Amendment To Trust; And For Appointment Of Temporary Trustee; And To Invalidate Gift To Care Giver,
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Ferris for Robert McMahon (Petitioner). Natacha Kolb for and with Renel Tron (Respondent).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to having standing to file this petition and the no contest clause. Petition to invalidate Fifth Amendment is denied (order for the same signed in open court). A Status Hearing is set on May 1, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition To Invalidate Fifth Amendment To Trust; And For Appointment Of Temporary Trustee; And To Invalidate Gift To Care Giver,
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Continued To Apr-03-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
